figure.title: Protocol Request Sequence - Complex Concurrent Exchanges
figure.purpose: Shows concurrent request exchanges with multiple acknowledgment messages flowing between nodes.

technical_summary: Local node sends an orange 'request' to Remote.
Remote node sends a green 'request' to Local.
Remote sends an orange 'ack' to Local.
Local sends a green 'ack' to Remote.
Local sends another orange 'ack' to Remote.
Remote sends another green 'ack' to Local.

critical_facts: Shows a highly interleaved sequence of requests and acknowledgments, indicating robust handling of out-of-order or multi-part message completions.
potential_ambiguities: The specific meaning of the extra ACKs (e.g., whether they represent multi-part data transfers or retries) is context-dependent.
